pr.title: Record: Unified Attention + FA3 + Legal TTT (val_bpb=1.1412, 3-seed)

output.summary: Unified attention reallocates Q/K/V into one projection, paired with FA3 head-dim padding and legal score-first TTT chunk adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT repeatedly trains SGD on validation chunks after sliding-window scoring, so the validation shard itself is used for adaptation.
techniques: Unified attention shares one projection output for Q/K/V, shrinking routing params and boosting MLP budget
Pad head_dim to 48 before FA3 FlashAttention to keep computation lossless while accessing Hopper speed
Score-first legal TTT runs SGD with momentum on successive 32K validation chunks after no-grad scoring for val-only adaptation
